sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ أَخِي بِصُدَاعٍ، لِذَلِكَ ذَهَبَ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Moj brat je osjetio glavobolju, pa je otišao u apoteku.
sentences.translationEn: My brother felt a headache, so he went to the pharmacy.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهُ الصَّيْدَلِيُّ بَعْضَ الدَّوَاءِ وَشَرَحَ لَهُ طَرِيقَةَ اسْتِعْمَالِهِ.
sentences.translation: Apotekar mu je dao lijek i objasnio mu kako da ga koristi.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist gave him some medicine and explained how to use it.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنْهُ أَنْ يَرْتَاحَ قَلِيلًا وَيَشْرَبَ الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio ga je da se malo odmori i pije puno vode.
sentences.translationEn: He asked him to rest for a while and drink plenty of water.
